symptoms: dynamic routes not working in production
root_cause: Dynamic routes not configured correctly or missing generateStaticParams for static export
fix: Ensure dynamic route files use correct bracket notation: [slug]/page.tsx
Add generateStaticParams() for statically generated dynamic routes
Check next.config.js for incorrect rewrites or redirects

symptoms: API works locally but fails on Vercel
root_cause: Edge runtime incompatibility or missing environment variables in Vercel
fix: Check Vercel dashboard for environment variables - ensure they are set for the correct environment (Production/Preview/Development)
Verify API route is not using Node.js-only APIs with edge runtime
Remove 'export const runtime = "edge"' if using Node.js specific modules

symptoms: text content does not match server-rendered HTML
root_cause: Component renders different content on server vs client, often due to browser-only APIs or date/time formatting
fix: Wrap browser-only code in useEffect or use dynamic import with { ssr: false }
Use suppressHydrationWarning for intentional mismatches like timestamps
Ensure consistent date formatting using UTC or a library like date-fns
Check for extensions or injected scripts that modify DOM

root_cause: Image domain not configured in next.config.js or loader misconfiguration
fix: Add remote image domains to next.config.js under images.remotePatterns
Example: images: { remotePatterns: [{ protocol: 'https', hostname: 'example.com' }] }
For external CDN, configure a custom loader or use unoptimized prop

root_cause: Middleware matcher misconfigured or infinite redirect loop due to missing path exclusions
fix: Check middleware.ts matcher config to ensure correct path patterns
Exclude API routes and static files: matcher: ['/((?!api|_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico).*)']
Add condition to skip redirect if already on target path

root_cause: Serverless function exceeds Vercel's default 10s timeout on Hobby plan (60s on Pro)
fix: Optimize database queries and add connection pooling
Increase maxDuration in route config: export const maxDuration = 30
Move long-running tasks to background jobs using Vercel Cron or a queue
Upgrade to Pro plan for up to 300s timeout

root_cause: Edge function using unsupported Node.js APIs or exceeding memory/size limits
fix: Remove Node.js-specific imports (fs, path, crypto with certain methods)
Switch to Node.js runtime: export const runtime = 'nodejs'
Reduce bundle size - edge functions have a 1MB limit after compression
Use edge-compatible alternatives: crypto.subtle instead of crypto

root_cause: Server-only module imported in client component or edge runtime
fix: Add 'use server' directive or move import to server component
Use next/dynamic with ssr: false for client-only imports
Add 'server-only' package to prevent accidental client imports: import 'server-only'
Check that server utilities aren't re-exported from barrel files used by client components

root_cause: Serverless function cannot reach external service or is using localhost URL in production
fix: Replace localhost URLs with production URLs using environment variables
Use NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix only for client-side env vars; use server-side env vars in API routes
Ensure external service allows connections from Vercel IP ranges
Add proper error handling and retry logic for transient network failures

root_cause: NextAuth.js not configured with correct NEXTAUTH_URL for Vercel deployment
fix: Set NEXTAUTH_URL to your production domain in Vercel environment variables
Set NEXTAUTH_SECRET using: openssl rand -base64 32
For Vercel, NEXTAUTH_URL can be omitted if using VERCEL_URL (auto-set by Vercel)
Ensure callback URLs in OAuth provider match the production domain

symptoms: Warning: Each child in a list should have a unique key prop
root_cause: React list items missing unique key prop or using array index as key with dynamic lists
fix: Add unique key prop to each element in map(): items.map(item => <div key={item.id}>)
Use stable unique identifiers, not array indices, for dynamic lists
If no unique ID exists, generate one at data creation time, not render time

symptoms: Warning: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component
root_cause: State update triggered during render phase instead of in effect or event handler
fix: Move state updates into useEffect() or event handlers
Use useCallback for memoized event handlers that trigger state updates
If derived state is needed, compute it during render without setState

symptoms: works locally but not in CI
root_cause: Node.js version mismatch or missing build configuration
fix: Set Node.js version in package.json engines field or Vercel project settings
Add .nvmrc file with target version (e.g., 18.17.0)
Check that all dependencies are in dependencies, not just devDependencies if needed at runtime
Set installCommand or buildCommand in vercel.json if using monorepo

root_cause: API routes missing CORS headers for cross-origin requests
fix: Add CORS headers in API route or middleware
In route handler: return new Response(body, { headers: { 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET,POST,OPTIONS' } })
Handle OPTIONS preflight: if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') return new Response(null, { status: 204, headers: corsHeaders })
Use vercel.json headers config for static assets

root_cause: Client-side env vars missing NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix or not included at build time
fix: Prefix client-side variables with NEXT_PUBLIC_: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
Server-side only vars (API keys, secrets) should NOT have NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix
Redeploy after adding env vars - they are baked in at build time for client
Use Vercel CLI: vercel env pull .env.local to sync environment variables

root_cause: Incorrect revalidation configuration or cache headers misconfigured
fix: Set revalidate in fetch options: fetch(url, { next: { revalidate: 60 } })
Use revalidatePath() or revalidateTag() in Server Actions for on-demand revalidation
For App Router: export const revalidate = 60 in page/layout
Check Vercel dashboard Data Cache section for cache hit/miss metrics

root_cause: Serverless environments create new connections per invocation without pooling
fix: Use connection pooling: PgBouncer for PostgreSQL, Prisma Data Proxy, or Vercel Postgres
For Prisma: use @prisma/client with connection pooling URL (port 6543 for Supabase)
Cache PrismaClient instance: globalThis.prisma = globalThis.prisma || new PrismaClient()
Consider Vercel KV (Redis) or Vercel Postgres for Vercel-native options

root_cause: Vercel serverless functions have a 4.5MB body size limit on request payload
fix: Use presigned URLs to upload directly to S3/Cloudflare R2 from the client
Configure API route body parser: export const config = { api: { bodyParser: { sizeLimit: '4mb' } } }
For App Router: export const maxDuration and use streaming
Use Vercel Blob Storage for simple file upload needs

root_cause: Need to implement route protection with proper session management
fix: Use NextAuth.js (Auth.js) or Clerk for managed authentication
Protect server components: const session = await getServerSession(authOptions)
Protect API routes: check session at start of handler
Use middleware.ts for route-level protection before page loads
Store session tokens in httpOnly cookies, not localStorage

symptoms: how to fetch data in server component
root_cause: Need to implement efficient data fetching with proper caching and error handling
fix: Fetch in Server Components directly: async function Page() { const data = await fetch(url) }
Use React cache() for request deduplication across components
Implement loading.tsx and error.tsx for Suspense boundaries
Use parallel data fetching with Promise.all() for independent requests
Set appropriate revalidation: fetch(url, { next: { revalidate: 3600, tags: ['posts'] } })

symptoms: form submission in Next.js App Router
root_cause: Need to implement mutations/form handling with Server Actions
fix: Define server action with 'use server' directive at top of function or file
Use in form: <form action={serverAction}>
For programmatic use: call server action from client with useTransition
Revalidate data after mutation: revalidatePath('/path') or revalidateTag('tag')
Return typed responses: use zod for validation, return { error } or { success } objects

root_cause: Need comprehensive error handling for both server and client errors
fix: Create app/error.tsx (client component) for route segment error boundaries
Create app/global-error.tsx for root layout errors
Create app/not-found.tsx for 404 pages
Use try/catch in Server Actions and return error state to client
Integrate error reporting: Sentry, LogRocket, or Vercel Web Analytics

symptoms: implement rate limiting on API routes
root_cause: API routes need rate limiting to prevent abuse in production
fix: Use Vercel KV (Redis) for distributed rate limiting
Install @upstash/ratelimit: npm install @upstash/ratelimit @upstash/redis
Code: const ratelimit = new Ratelimit({ redis: Redis.fromEnv(), limiter: Ratelimit.slidingWindow(10, '10s') })
In handler: const { success } = await ratelimit.limit(identifier); if (!success) return Response.json({ error: 'Too many requests' }, { status: 429 })
Use IP from headers: request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for') ?? '127.0.0.1'

root_cause: Need to run periodic tasks in serverless environment
fix: Create API route: app/api/cron/route.ts
Add to vercel.json: { "crons": [{ "path": "/api/cron", "schedule": "0 */6 * * *" }] }
Verify request is from Vercel Cron: if (req.headers.get('Authorization') !== `Bearer ${process.env.CRON_SECRET}`) return Response.json({}, { status: 401 })
Set CRON_SECRET env var in Vercel dashboard
Pro plan required for cron intervals less than once per day

root_cause: Need to revalidate cached pages when CMS content changes
fix: Create revalidation API route: app/api/revalidate/route.ts
Use revalidateTag: import { revalidateTag } from 'next/cache'; revalidateTag('blog-posts');
Or revalidatePath: import { revalidatePath } from 'next/cache'; revalidatePath('/blog');
Secure endpoint with secret: if (req.headers.get('x-webhook-secret') !== process.env.REVALIDATION_SECRET) return Response.json({ message: 'Invalid secret' }, { status: 401 })
Configure CMS webhook to hit /api/revalidate on content publish

root_cause: Multiple potential causes for performance degradation
fix: Check Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights for real user metrics
Run Lighthouse audit and check LCP, FID/INP, CLS scores
Identify blocking resources: check if large JS bundles are loaded unnecessarily
Use next/dynamic for code splitting heavy components
Check for waterfall requests: use parallel fetching or preload patterns
Verify images use next/image with proper sizes and priority props
Check if using 'use client' unnecessarily on large component trees

symptoms: build succeeds locally but fails in CI
root_cause: Environment differences between local and Vercel build environment
fix: Check Vercel build logs in deployment details for exact error
Compare Node.js versions: local vs Vercel (set in project settings)
Run 'next build' locally with same env vars to reproduce
Check for case-sensitive import paths (Vercel runs Linux, may differ from macOS)
Verify all env vars needed at build time are set in Vercel
Check for missing dependencies: move from devDependencies if needed at build
Clear .next folder and node_modules, then rebuild: rm -rf .next node_modules && npm install && npm run build

root_cause: Memory leak in serverless function or improper resource cleanup
fix: Check Vercel Function logs for memory usage patterns
Ensure database connections are properly closed or pooled
Avoid storing large objects in module-level variables (persists across warm invocations)
Profile locally with --inspect flag: node --inspect node_modules/.bin/next dev
Check for event listener leaks: always remove listeners in useEffect cleanup
Use streaming for large responses instead of buffering entire payload

root_cause: CSS-in-JS library not configured for server-side rendering or font loading not optimized
fix: For Tailwind: ensure globals.css is imported in root layout.tsx
For CSS-in-JS (styled-components): configure compiler in next.config.js: compiler: { styledComponents: true }
Use next/font for optimized font loading: import { Inter } from 'next/font/google'
Add font-display: swap for custom fonts
Preload critical CSS with <link rel='preload'>

root_cause: Cookie configuration incompatible with Vercel deployment domain or SameSite policy
fix: Set cookie domain to match production domain (omit for current domain only)
Use SameSite: 'lax' for most cases, 'none' requires Secure flag
Ensure cookies are set with Secure: true in production (HTTPS)
For cross-subdomain auth: set domain to '.yourdomain.com'
Check that cookie path is '/' for site-wide access
Verify cookie is not being blocked by browser privacy settings

root_cause: useEffect dependency array causes infinite loop or object/array reference changes on every render
fix: Check useEffect dependencies: avoid objects/arrays that create new references each render
Memoize objects with useMemo and functions with useCallback
Move static objects outside component or use useRef for stable references
Split useEffect into multiple focused effects with minimal dependencies
Use primitive values in dependency arrays when possible

root_cause: Unoptimized bundle with unnecessary client-side JavaScript
fix: Analyze bundle: npm install @next/bundle-analyzer && add to next.config.js
Use dynamic imports for heavy components: const Heavy = dynamic(() => import('./Heavy'), { ssr: false })
Keep components as Server Components by default; only add 'use client' when needed
Tree-shake large libraries: import { specific } from 'library' instead of import library
Use next/script with strategy='lazyOnload' for third-party scripts
Enable gzip/brotli compression (Vercel handles this automatically)

root_cause: Unoptimized database access pattern in serverless environment
fix: Enable connection pooling (PgBouncer, Prisma Accelerate, or Vercel Postgres)
Add database indexes for frequently queried columns
Implement pagination instead of fetching all records
Use select to fetch only needed fields: prisma.user.findMany({ select: { id: true, name: true } })
Cache frequent queries with unstable_cache or React cache()
Place database in same region as Vercel serverless functions (check in Vercel dashboard)
Use Vercel Edge Config for frequently read, rarely written configuration data

root_cause: Images not optimized or missing proper sizing configuration
fix: Use next/image component for automatic optimization
Add priority prop to LCP image: <Image priority src={...} />
Always specify width and height or use fill with sizes prop
Use sizes prop for responsive images: sizes='(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 50vw'
Serve modern formats (WebP/AVIF) - next/image handles this automatically
Use placeholder='blur' with blurDataURL for perceived performance
Configure remote patterns for external image sources in next.config.js

root_cause: Large serverless function bundle size or heavy initialization code
fix: Minimize function bundle: avoid importing entire libraries when only using one function
Use edge runtime for latency-sensitive routes: export const runtime = 'edge'
Reduce dependency count in API routes
Pre-warm functions with Vercel Cron hitting critical paths
Choose function region closest to your users in vercel.json: { "regions": ["iad1"] }
Split large API routes into smaller, focused route handlers
